examples: You are what one might call a Draconic Knight.
You exhale draconic energy that detonates at a distance.
If there ever was a draconic example of a supple attitude, your Inner Dragon is it.
Jorah tries to comfort her, but the only comfort she needs is the draconic kind.
Such draconic measures will likely prove too much for the next administration and it will try to kick the can down the road to the next administration.
